codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior blocking gaps. Compared with the original timer page-family commit, the updated spec now adds subview-local assertions for both seeded-fact continuity and running-timer visibility: list view checks are scoped to the list container, timesheet checks assert non-empty aggregated content with the seeded project row, and running-timer coverage now includes calendar now-line proof plus list/timesheet content assertions instead of relying only on shared header state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-test-worker skill requires using agent-browser for a manual story-path verification after automated tests pass, but this worker completed the fix without any manual browser check or documented runtime/session conflict. The skill procedure is stricter than current practice and may need clarification about when scrutiny-fix coverage work can rely on Playwright-only evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file .factory/skills/frontend-test-worker/SKILL.md step 9 requires agent-browser/manual verification. The transcript skeleton for worker session 5af31fbe-243d-4a51-8f69-e1675ff3aa34 shows only repo reads, Playwright/check commands, edits, and git commands; handoff.verification.interactiveChecks is empty.

summary: Reviewed the prior failure, the original mainline diff, the fix handoff/transcript, and commit 6954bf9. The fix adequately resolves the original scrutiny blockers by adding view-local timer evidence in list and timesheet plus stronger cross-view seeded-fact assertions, so this follow-up review passes.
